howItWorksSection1.description: Getting started with our platform is easy. Follow these simple steps to transform your supply chain management.

steps.title: Create Account
steps.description: Sign up for free and complete your company profile. No credit card required to get started.

steps.title: Add Inventory
steps.description: Import your inventory manually or connect with your existing systems via our API.

steps.title: Start Shipping
steps.description: Create shipments, track deliveries, and manage your logistics from one dashboard.

steps.title: Analyze & Optimize
steps.description: Get insights, generate reports, and optimize your supply chain for better performance.

items.title: No Credit Card Required
items.description: Start your free trial today. No commitments, cancel anytime.

items.title: 24/7 Customer Support
items.description: Our team is always available to help you with any questions.

howItWorksSection2.description: Experience our platform with this interactive guide. Click through each step to see how easy it is to manage your supply chain.

steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.description: Sign up in minutes with your email. No credit card required for the free trial.

steps.title: Import Inventory
steps.description: Easily import your existing inventory via CSV, Excel, or connect with your systems.

steps.title: Manage Shipments
steps.description: Create and track shipments with real-time updates and automated notifications.

steps.title: Analyze Performance
steps.description: Get insights with powerful analytics and customizable reports.

howItWorksSection3.description: Follow our proven path to transform your supply chain. Each step brings you closer to complete visibility and control.

steps.title: Discovery & Onboarding
steps.description: We start by understanding your unique business needs and goals. Our team works with you to set up your account and import your data.

steps.title: Inventory Setup
steps.description: We help you organize your inventory with our smart categorization system. Set up warehouses, SKUs, and reorder points.

steps.title: Shipping Integration
steps.description: Connect with multiple carriers and start shipping. Real-time tracking and automated label generation included.

steps.title: Optimization & Growth
steps.description: Use advanced analytics to optimize your supply chain. Identify trends, reduce costs, and scale your operations.

bottomCards.title: Fast Implementation
bottomCards.description: Get up and running in days, not months. Our team ensures smooth and quick deployment.

bottomCards.title: Enterprise Security
bottomCards.description: Your data is protected with bank-level encryption and regular security audits.

bottomCards.title: Global Support
bottomCards.description: 24/7 customer support with dedicated account managers for enterprise clients.

classes.base: min-h-screen max-w-7xl mx-auto bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-50 via-white to-purple-50

seo.title: How It Works - Sazzad Inventory & Logistics
seo.description: Follow our simple step-by-step process to transform your supply chain management with Sazzad's powerful platform.
seo.keywords: how it works, step by step guide, logistics process, inventory workflow, supply chain journey

structuredData.name: Sazzad Platform Guide
structuredData.description: Complete guide to using Sazzad platform
